chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.1096 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders on M.A. No.1041/2026 (U/A) --------------------------------------------- 27.01.2026 Mr. Shoaib Safdar, A.P.G. ------------------------------------------------ Mr. Shafiq Ahmed, Advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Liaquat Ali Khan, learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application and seeks direction for early disposal of the case. Learned A.P.G. has recorded no objection for such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed, however, with direction to the learned trial Court to decide the case of the applicant expeditiously, preferably within a period of three months, under intimation to this Court through learned MIT- II. However, it is made clear that no adjournment on any flimsy grounds would be granted to either party during trial. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
